response.justification: Bogdan has over 12 years of diverse full-stack experience with strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker) and demonstrated expertise in AI-agent infrastructure, cloud platforms (AWS), testing (Vitest/Jest equivalents), and architecture — plus notable open-source contributions and process discipline. His only minor gaps are limited explicit mention of Nest.js and Kotlin/Java in recent roles, but his adaptability and depth compensate.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP and agentic workflows
Strong engineering culture: TDD, CI/CD, code reviews, and active open-source contributions with testing frameworks
concerns: Nest.js is not explicitly mentioned in recent roles, though Node.js and architecture skills are strong
Kotlin/Java experience is dated (pre-2020), with no recent enterprise backend work shown in those languages
German language proficiency is basic, which may slightly hinder collaboration in Berlin-based teams

key_factors.factor: Limited recent Kotlin/Java or Nest.js exposure
